title: Archive Closeout Valid By Construction
goal: Implement the first #355 slice: make planning archive closeout easier to get right by generating valid closeout fields from simple command flags.
non_goals: Implement review generators, contract scaffolds, or local-memory append commands in this slice.

intent.outcome: A common archive/closeout repair loop becomes valid-by-construction enough that agents do not learn normalized closure vocabulary only from refusal messages.
intent.constraints: Stay on master; keep package behavior repo-/agent-/tool-/language-agnostic; use command flags and generated record updates rather than another durable public surface.
intent.latitude: Choose archive-plan --prepare-closeout or a narrow closeout helper path, whichever is smaller in the current CLI shape.
intent.escalation: Stop before changing the full execplan schema or weakening archive validation.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan using archive-plan --prepare-closeout after reconcile/summary are clean.
execution.proof: Use proof --changed, planning package tests/ruff, maintainer surfaces if payload changes, root checks if workspace wrappers change, reconcile, summary.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Reduce validation-driven repair loops so Agentic Workspace feels smaller and easier to operate.

required_continuation.activation trigger: Fresh #355 follow-up pressure after the archive closeout slice lands.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Archive closeout can be prepared through package-owned command shape instead of manual JSON repair.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Review generators, contract scaffolds, report-to-artifact transforms, and local-memory append flows.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Archive closeout still requires execution summary and proof content, but the normalized intent/closure/distillation vocabulary no longer needs to be learned from refusal loops.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: archive-plan --prepare-closeout dry-run emits a patch, and normal execution prepares and archives representative close and keep-open records.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: Final reconcile and summary after archive.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Defer other #355 target areas to #230 until fresh repair-loop pressure appears.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Plan and implement the suggested improvements. Issue #355 already contains some of that, so ingest it first.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Start with #355 and implement the first high-friction valid-by-construction improvement end to end.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement planning closeout/archive preparation, then close #355 if this bounded first slice satisfies it or route remaining work to #230.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that the change reduces manual repair work rather than only expanding error messages.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: packages/planning CLI/installer/tests, planning payload mirrors, root wrapper surfaces only if required, planning state/evidence/archive.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Prefer under 12 files including generated payload mirrors.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: agentic-workspace proof --changed; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; make maintainer-surfaces if payload changes; check_planning_surfaces; reconcile; summary.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Adding a second new command beyond archive-plan flags or changing the execplan schema.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Review generator, operation contract scaffold, local-memory implementation, branch switching.

stop_conditions.stop when: The archive closeout preparation path is implemented, tested, documented through CLI help/JSON output shape, and this plan archives cleanly.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The needed fix requires broad schema redesign rather than command-level preparation.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Work expands into unrelated #355 target areas.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Proof-selected validation fails outside touched surfaces.

context_budget.live working set: preflight, issue #355, archive-plan CLI/installer/tests, this execplan
context_budget.recoverable later: older review artifacts and non-closeout #355 sections
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run and closeout_distillation before archive.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before schema redesign or if package tests reveal broader command boundary needs.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make the first #355 archive closeout repair loop valid-by-construction.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Stay portable and avoid broad new visible surfaces.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact archive-plan flag names and generated field defaults.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The smallest working path requires schema loosening or a new broad command family.

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed plan with archive-plan --prepare-closeout.
invariants: Do not make GitHub a shipped package dependency.
Keep validation as a guardrail for exceptional cases.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Archive closeout preparation should write normalized values rather than only describing them in refusal messages.
open_questions_to_close: Closed: archive-plan itself carries the preparation path through --prepare-closeout.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
completion_criteria: A representative archive closeout can be prepared through command flags and then archived without manual JSON repair.
Tests prove the generated record validates.
No active execplan remains after archive closeout.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; gh issue view 355
execution_run.what happened: Added archive-plan --prepare-closeout flags that generate normalized intent satisfaction, closure check, and closeout-distillation fields before archive validation.
execution_run.scope touched: Planning package CLI, archive installer logic, focused package tests, planning state/evidence, and this execplan.
execution_run.changed surfaces: packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/cli.py, installer.py, packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py, planning state/evidence, and active execplan.
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json.
execution_run.result for continuation: #355 first recommended slice is complete and the issue is closed; remaining candidate areas are deferred to #230.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; only the planning closeout/archive first slice was implemented.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; one normal validation-repair loop is now valid-by-construction.
finished_run_review.config compliance: used package workflow surfaces, stayed on master, and kept GitHub as external evidence only.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; other #355 target areas were explicitly deferred.

proof_report.validation proof: proof selected planning_surfaces and planning_package; package tests, package ruff, and planning doctor passed.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Focused tests cover dry-run patch output, one-command prepare plus archive, and keep-open parent-lane closeout.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Plan and implement the suggested improvements. Issue #355 already contains some of that, so ingest it first.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Reduce total successful-completion cost and make package use cheaper than schema rediscovery.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer valid-by-construction command output over expanded validation prose.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this pass remove a normal repair loop rather than merely document it?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when #230 activates a fresh bounded slice.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: archive-plan --prepare-closeout writes normalized closeout fields from simple flags and can archive without manual JSON repair.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: The command behavior and tests are the durable owner; no new docs or Memory needed.
execution_summary.resume from: #230 for future repair-loop or product-compression pressure.

discard.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed for local execution detail.

continuation.summary: Remaining #355 target areas stay deferred unless fresh repair-loop pressure appears.

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted #355 first slice after identifying archive closeout as the freshest repair-loop friction.
